HediffDef.label: elite: infernus
HediffDef.description:
Reactive Armor: The unit cannot be re-injured for 1 seconds after it is wounded. 

Fire Power Boost: The power of the main cannon and self-defense flames is significantly increased. 

Strong Armor: The unit is virtually impervious to any traditional sharp and blunt weapon damage. 

Flammable: The unit takes twice as much damage from all heat.

Predictable Terror: All humanoid organisms less than 59 frames away from this unit will be terrified of its hideous appearance and mode of action. After a certain threshold of fear is reached, the person will fall out of control due to panic.

HediffDef.label: elite: war empress
HediffDef.description:
Reactive Armor: The unit cannot be re-injured for 1 seconds after it is wounded. 

Firepower Boost: The number of loaded guttersnipe is significantly increased.

Predictable Terror: All humanoid organisms less than 59 frames away from this unit will be terrified of its hideous appearance and mode of action. After a certain threshold of fear is reached, the person will fall out of control due to panic.

HediffDef.label: elite: apoptosis
HediffDef.description:
Reactive Armor: The unit cannot be re-injured for 1 seconds after it is wounded. 

Component Improvement: The consumption when reviving friendly mechanoids is significantly reduced. 

Thought Disruption: Within 55 squares of the unit's circle, organic enemies will lose all of their vision and most of their neural heat cap. 

Predictable Terror: All humanoid organisms less than 59 frames away from this unit will be terrified of its hideous appearance and mode of action. After a certain threshold of fear is reached, the person will fall out of control due to panic.
